steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence establishes Belew's talent for detailed design as a general principle. The second sentence then provides a specific detail—the blue rhinestones—as a concrete example of that skill. The transition must signal this relationship between a general claim and its specific illustration.

steps.title: Match the transition to the choices
steps.content: In particular signals that what follows provides a specific illustration of the general claim—the blue rhinestones exemplify the attention to detail already mentioned. The other three create wrong relationships: Next and Soon suggest temporal sequence, while Nevertheless suggests an unwarranted contrast. That matches choice B — B is correct.
